ew_context: Gold completing corrective bounce to 61.8% Fibonacci level before resuming bearish wave 3 extension toward major support zones
pattern_desc: Failed bounce at 4739.51 Fibonacci 61.8% level with EMA20 below EMA50 confirming bearish trend continuation. Rejection from key resistance area.
key_levels: Resistance: 4739.51 (Fib 61.8% rejection level). Support: 4512.70 (major swing low), 4100.80 (deeper support)
invalidation: Close above 4888.79 on D1 timeframe would negate bearish bias and suggest deeper correction higher
market_context: Gold under pressure from rising Treasury yields hitting 12-month highs and risk-off flows favoring USD strength over precious metals.
full_analysis:
## Market Structure & Technical Context

Gold is showing rejection at the 4739.51 level which represents a key Fibonacci 61.8% retracement from the prior decline. The failure to sustain above this technical level coincides with bearish trend structure where EMA20 at 4670.59 trades below EMA50 at 4713.19, confirming the dominant downtrend remains intact. RSI at 43.0% provides room for further downside momentum without reaching oversold extremes that might trigger short-covering.

ATR of 74.64 reflects elevated precious metals volatility, while Reynolds number of 154.47 indicates turbulent impulsive flow with aligned momentum supporting directional continuation rather than range-bound consolidation.

## Key Levels

- **Resistance**: 4739.51 (Fibonacci 61.8% rejection level and entry point)
- **Support**: 4512.70 (major swing low support zone), 4100.80 (deeper structural support)

## Invalidation Level

Close above 4888.79 on D1 timeframe would break above the stop loss and negate the bearish Fibonacci rejection pattern, suggesting deeper corrective bounce potential.

## Macro & Flow Context

Treasury yields hitting 12-month highs creating significant headwinds for non-yielding gold, while risk-off geopolitical tensions paradoxically favor USD strength over precious metals. Turbulent flow with momentum alignment supports sustained directional selling pressure.
